subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Thy call hath been heard, and the countenance of the Wronged One hath, from the direction of the Most Great Prison, turned toward thee. This is of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسین ندایت شنیده شد و طرف مظلوم از شطر سجن اعظم بتو توجه نمود این از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
